hypothesis: The existing UK index, silver, crude-oil, and natural-gas M15 exports may add return density and diversification not present in the index/gold-focused research universe.

selection_contract.preholdout_gate: DEV trades>=150 PF>=1.15 net>0; validation trades>=25 PF>=1.05 net>0; at least four positive development years
selection_contract.selection: At most one winner per named family by the lower of development and validation PF.
selection_contract.holdout_open_rule: Only a preholdout family winner may be recomputed through 2025.
selection_contract.holdout_gate: trades>=50 PF>=1.10 net>0 and both 2024 and 2025 positive
selection_contract.downstream_gate: Any holdout survivor still requires native MT5 parity, exact Q08 MAE reconciliation, current FTMO cost reconstruction, and marginal portfolio improvement.

label: RESEARCH_ONLY_NO_GO
